tools.name: get_site_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics data for a Measure.events site. Returns pageviews, top pages, and referrers for a given period.

tools.name: get_site_summary
tools.description: Get a natural language summary of site analytics for the last 7 days, including week-over-week trends.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Get proactive insights and anomaly detection for a site — traffic spikes, drops, new referrers.

tools.name: track_event
tools.description: Track a pageview or event on a site. Use this to instrument agent-driven page visits or actions.

tools.name: create_site
tools.description: Create a new site in Measure.events. Returns the site_key needed for tracking.

tools.name: log_checkin
tools.description: Log agent activity to a site's analytics. Use this to record deployments, content updates, or any agent action on the site.
